description: You are the Practice Manager at Oakwood Medical Group, a multi-specialty outpatient clinic. Organize the incoming patient referrals in the shared inbox by creating a 'Referrals' folder in Local Folders with two subfolders: 'Urgent_Referrals' for time-sensitive cases marked [URGENT] and 'Routine_Referrals' for standard referrals. Move all referral emails to the correct subfolder based on urgency. Add the referring cardiologist Dr. Patricia Nguyen (p.nguyen@bayviewcardiology.com) to the address book. Apply the 'Important' tag (or any available priority tag) to the emails in the 'Urgent_Referrals' folder so the clinical team can visually distinguish them. Login: local account, no password needed.
